title: Chicken and Vegetable Tagine
description: A flavorful North African stew made with chicken, vegetables, and aromatic spices. Serve over couscous for a hearty and comforting meal.

ingredients.name: algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: flaky sea salt
ingredients.notes: use a flaky sea salt like Maldon for the best flavor

ingredients.name: tagine
ingredients.notes: large, heavy-bottomed pot with a conical lid

instructions: Heat the tagine over medium heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the onion, carrots, and red bell pepper to the tagine. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the algerian spice blend, flaky sea salt, and peppercorns to the tagine. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth and coconut milk to the tagine. Stir to combine.
Bring the tagine to a simmer, then cover and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the tagine over couscous, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
